creator: thomas@cuivre.fr.eu.org
text:
Le 2001-04-07, will@FreeBSD.org écrivait :

> There is no way in hell I'm putting a patch like that in the
> ports tree!  Unless you can convince me otherwise... ;)

Could you be a little more specific as to why you deem the submitted
port to be inappropriate?

Thanks,
Thomas.
